SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHHABRIA, NAMDU
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUTNAM TOYOTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHHABRIA, NAMDU ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR (SERVICE AGENT:CT CORP) $1,648.89 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.89, DEFENDANT'S DID NOT FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHHABRIA, NAMDU ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR (SERVICE AGENT:CT CORP)
